page_metadata.biotools__summary: PLEXY is a tool for computation of optimal thermodynamical interactions of a box C/D snoRNA with a putative target RNA. It is based on RNAPLEX.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PLEXY is a tool for computation of optimal thermodynamical interactions of a box C/D snoRNA with a putative target RNA. It is based on RNAPLEX.
